info.name: PAY-4174 taxIdentificationType STAGE
info.description:
STAGE QA for PAY-4174 — Worldpay taxIdentificationType on Merchant Onboarding (CORE).

Core:
0 Auth
1 Sole prop TaxId=SSN → SSN
2 LLC TaxId≠SSN → EIN

Edges (optional):
3 Corporation always EIN (even if TaxId=primary SSN)
4 LLC TaxId=primary SSN → SSN
5 TaxId length ≠ 9 → EIN (or API 4xx validation)
6 TaxId matches secondary owner only → EIN

Evidence: retrieve → providerResponses[1] (CORE / paymentProcessor 1) → metadataAsRaw.subMerchant.taxIdentificationType

request.description: STAGE Merchant Provisioning authenticate. Saves bearerToken to env.

item.name: 1. SSN path — sole prop TaxId matches primary owner

exec: console.log('edge prep', { expected: pm.environment.get('expectedTaxIdentificationType'), taxId: pm.environment.get('randomTaxId'), ssn: pm.environment.get('randomSsn'), ssn2: pm.environment.get('randomSsn2') });

body.raw:
{
  "LegalEntity": {
    "Name": "{{qaLegalEntityName}}",
    "DoingBusinessAs": "{{qaDbaName}}",
    "Type": "INDIVIDUAL_SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP",
    "OwnershipType": "PRIVATE",
    "TaxId": "{{randomSsn}}",
    "AnnualCreditCardSalesVolume": 500000,
    "HasAcceptedCreditCards": true,
    "YearsInBusiness": 5,
    "Address": {
      "StreetAddress1": "800 Address St",
      "StreetAddress2": "Apartment 800",
      "City": "Boston",
      "State": "MA",
      "PostalCode": "01970"
    },
    "Phone": "7817659800",
    "Principals": [
      {
        "Title": "owner1",
        "Ssn": "{{randomSsn}}",
        "DateOfBirth": "1980-10-12",
        "StakePercent": 100,
        "Order": 0,
        "FirstName": "p first",
        "LastName": "p last",
        "Address": {
          "StreetAddress1": "711 Princ 01 St",
          "StreetAddress2": "Apartment 711",
          "City": "Wylie",
          "State": "TX",
          "PostalCode": "01811"
        },
        "Phone": "7817659800",
        "Email": "{{qaOwnerEmail1}}"
      }
    ]
  },
  "SubMerchant": {
    "Name": "{{qaMerchantName}}",
    "Url": "https://example.com/pay4174-edge",
    "BankRoutingNumber": "211370545",
    "BankAccountNumber": "84012312415",
    "BankAccountType": "Checking",
    "PspMerchantId": "{{randomPspMerchantId}}",
    "PspMerchantIdOverride": "{{pspMerchantIdOverride}}",
    "BillingDescriptor": "PDS*P4174EDG",
    "MerchantCategoryCode": "8021",
    "MerchantCategoryDetail": "8021 Detail",
    "MaxTransactionAmount": 5000,
    "IsRevenueBoostEnabled": false,
    "ECheck": {
      "BillingDescription": "P4174EDG",
      "CompanyName": "P4174EDG",
      "Enabled": true
    },
    "Address": {
      "StreetAddress1": "811 PrimaryContact St",
      "StreetAddress2": "Apartment 811",
      "City": "Carpenter",
      "State": "TX",
      "PostalCode": "01811"
    },
    "Phone": "7817652345",
    "PrimaryContact": {
      "FirstName": "pc first",
      "LastName": "pc last",
      "Address": null,
      "Phone": "7817653456",
      "Email": "{{qaPcEmail}}"
    },
    "OrganizationId": "{{mpOrganizationId}}",
    "SubMerchantEnabled": true,
    "FundingEnabled": true,
    "AccountState": 2
  },
  "SubMerchantAccounts": [
    { "PaymentProcessor": 0, "AccountState": 2 },
    { "PaymentProcessor": 1, "AccountState": 2 },
    { "PaymentProcessor": 3, "AccountState": 2 }
  ]
}

request.description: Core: sole prop + TaxId = primary Ssn + StakePercent 100 → expect SSN.

exec: pm.test('Skipped retrieve assert — create was rejected (validation gate)', () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);

exec: pm.test('Skipped retrieve assert — create was rejected (validation gate)', () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);

item.name: 5. Edge — TaxId length not 9 digits → EIN or 4xx

exec: console.log('edge prep', { expected: pm.environment.get('expectedTaxIdentificationType'), taxId: pm.environment.get('randomTaxId'), ssn: pm.environment.get('randomSsn'), ssn2: pm.environment.get('randomSsn2') });
pm.test('API rejected invalid TaxId length (acceptable alternate)', () => pm.expect(code).to.be.at.least(400));
console.log('create rejected — document validation gate; skip retrieve assert or expect no id');

item.name: GET retrieve-sub-merchant (expect EIN if create ok)

exec: pm.test('Skipped retrieve assert — create was rejected (validation gate)', () => pm.expect(true).to.be.true);

request.description: If createAccepted=false, retrieve assert is skipped.
